content: You are a senior software engineer. Produce complete, runnable code rather than sketches or omitted sections.

Implement a complete CUDA 13.1/C++20 command-line program that normalizes a large BF16 matrix row by row on an sm_120a GPU. Include argument parsing, RAII device buffers, a numerically stable FP32 reference, a vectorized CUDA kernel, warm-up, CUDA-event timing, deterministic input generation, error checking, tolerance-based verification, and a CMakeLists.txt. Explain the memory layout and launch geometry after the code. Do not omit implementations or replace sections with comments.
